docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RICE, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT FREYER, HEATHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT W/ACCOMPANYING DOCUMENTATION. (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR REVIEW) FILED BY DEFENDANT FREYER, HEATHER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF DONALD RICE RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, DONALD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED SEP-05-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FREYER, HEATHER
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: OCTOBER 2, 2013).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICE, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREYER, HEATHER $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,050.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN NOVEMBER 8, 2013, RETURN TO PLAINTIFF THE GARDEN BELL AND STAND WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-02-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-11-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FREYER, HEATHER
